title: Worforms - Allow spaces / new lines on Welcome Screen "Description"
excerpt:
I would like to be able to write a long description at the start of the survey to allow for consent etc. 
Would it be possible to allow us to split up the text (take a new line) rather than a large block?

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
